findings.message: Missing return statement: get_item only raises HTTPException on the not-found branch and implicitly returns None when the item is found. Because the route declares `-> Item` with `response_model=ItemRead`, every successful lookup will yield None to FastAPI's serializer and produce a 500 response-validation error instead of the item.
findings.suggestion: Add `return item` after the 404 guard so the found item is returned to the caller.

findings.message: Falsy check `if not item:` on the result of `session.get(...)` is incorrect intent: the proper sentinel for 'row not found' is `None`, and using truthiness conflates 'not found' with any object whose `__bool__` is False. Use an explicit `is None` comparison to make the intent and behavior unambiguous (and to avoid relying on ORM instances always being truthy).
findings.suggestion: Replace `if not item:` with `if item is None:`.
